g.title: G
g.text: FlowForm subject authority + token/link action policy

g.title: pg_user_diff
g.text: Token: merge weaker token subject, rotate

g.title: pv_none
g.text: Link consumed: yes, on session start

g.title: pv_diff
g.text: Token: merge weaker token subject, rotate
Link consumed: yes, on session start
Tx: merge + session + token + link consumption

g.title: al_none
g.text: Link consumed: yes, on session start

g.title: al_diff
g.text: Token: merge weaker token subject, rotate
Link consumed: yes, on session start
Tx: merge + session + token + link consumption

g.title: ac_match
g.text: Logged in + email matches assigned identity?

g.title: ac_diff
g.text: Token: merge weaker token subject, rotate
Tx: identity + token effects commit consistently

g.title: ac_reject
g.text: Reject or defer to stricter docs

g.title: legend
g.text: Target-local rule: add more rows only when docs require a more specific branch.
